title: hieracium valoddae subsp. raccolanae
intro: Hieracium valoddae subsp. raccolanae, also known as the Sardinian Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Sardinia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium valoddae subsp. raccolanae include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
